title: Questions for Jeremy Dan
excerpt: Do you remember your childhood dreams? i wanted to drive nascar
body:
Do you remember your childhood dreams?
i wanted to drive nascar

Morning shower or evening?
morning

Is there anything you regret not doing?
being more selfish, not kissing a few girls, keeping more money, not punching some dudes in the mouth
also not going to the fucking gym
not folding AQo when i got 3 bet utg v gun2 by the only competent player at my table table 12 left of the monster stack prob cost me a half mil. four betting him was fucking retarded i need to learn how to go slower
oh, and losing that 25k chip at the fucking encore after i got second in the 25k. what the fuck man

What was your first job?
$5 shoe warehouse, bensonhurst

What would you put on your tombstone?
i would let chandler write it, i would probably write some bullshit about living or dying by the sword, but I don't think I know my truth as well as the people I love.

What would be your last meal?
tacis beyti lamb chops + kunefe + spinach pie

What are you reading?
chatgpt telling me everything is going to be ok

What movie have you seen the most times?
mean girls on the bus in camp

Thoughts on love?
i think it's the driving force behind everything, but I dunno, i think when you know you know and i don't

What are your beauty secrets?
be vulgar and aggressive

How do you know when you've had enough?
when i can't look myself in the eyes

When do you get nervous?
When I sit still

What's living on your nightstand?
white claw that a girl never finished, maybe she'll come back, nasal strips, cologne, she never liked me anyways, lamp i never use, remote for a TV i don't use, i should text her

Favorite thing about the city you live in?
It is infinite

Have you been kicked out anywhere?
drais when the grinder won the main event. a frat basement in school because they thought i was a different white boy, a group chat where me and some homies played mafia and board games a couple years ago for no real reason that still bums me out

What keeps you here?
I kind of just hate myself and everything about and around me so I think I can fix that and then see what's good. Also I wanna be up there with the best in the world at whatever I do. I dunno. I'm a fucking loser
There's always another mountain and things will always get better
One of my ogs told me once that I haven't come close to being the end product of myself a couple years ago. That I have no idea how many lifetimes I've yet to live. I cling to it
